description: Enabling agents to reflect on their outputs, identify improvements, and evolve their strategies over time through iterative self-assessment and inter-episode learning.

papers.title: EvoTest: Evolutionary Test-Time Learning for Self-Improving Agentic Systems
papers.authors: Yufei He, Juncheng Liu, et al.
papers.key_insight: Actor + Evolver architecture for gradient-free whole-system evolution

papers.title: A Survey of Self-Evolving Agents: What, When, How, and Where to Evolve
papers.authors: Huan-ang Gao, Jiayi Geng, et al. (27 authors)
papers.key_insight: Taxonomy of self-evolution: what/when/how to evolve, intra vs inter-test-time

papers.title: Meta Context Engineering via Agentic Skill Evolution
papers.authors: Haoran Ye, Xuning He, et al.
papers.key_insight: Bi-level optimization: meta-level skill evolution + base-level context optimization

papers.title: Reflective Agentic AI: Workflows That Outperform GPT-4
papers.key_insight: Plan → Execute → Self-Assess → Refine workflow pattern

key_findings: Gradient-free whole-system evolution (EvoTest) achieves 38-57% improvement over baselines
MCE achieves 5.6-53.8% improvement through bi-level optimization
Reflective workflows can make GPT-3.5 outperform GPT-4
